non_blocking_findings: DeepSeek noted the dynamic Workbench source guard initially covered only css/ts/tsx and lacked build/dependency directory exclusions; the final test now covers js/jsx/mjs/cjs/ts/tsx/mts/cts/css and skips .next, node_modules, tmp, dist, and build.
DeepSeek noted the broader src/tools/test denominator has no equivalent dynamic drift guard. This remains outside the scoped Workbench dashboard entrypoint risk.

scope.diff_summary: Expanded the durable code-review coverage denominator from 20 to 43 first-party files, including all current apps/workbench/app routes, shell, layout/provider/theme/error/loading/not-found files, Workbench API clients, hooks, and task-flow layer. Added a regression test that enumerates the real Workbench app/lib source tree and fails if any current source file is missing from the coverage artifact.
gates_reviewed: npm run check:code-review-coverage -- docs/examples/code-review-coverage-current.json passed with first_party_file_count 43 and shard_count 6.
node tools/run-with-node18.mjs --test test/workbench-api-client.test.js test/workbench-shell.test.js test/code-review-coverage-dispatch.test.js passed with 23/23 tests.
node ../../tools/run-with-node18.mjs node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build passed for apps/workbench after npm ci installed worktree-local dependencies.
npm run test:coverage passed with 950/950 tests, all-files line coverage 91.78%, and all-files function coverage 96.93%.
npm run check:closeout passed after installing worktree-local root dependencies for the Playwright-backed public browser route check.
npm run check:known-risk-closeout passed with risk_count 7, open_count 2, terminal_count 5.
npm run check:known-risk-closeout:required failed only for the two remaining scoped-out open risks.

notes: Implementation review, delta review, final delta review, closeout ledger review, and precommit closeout review were all read-only DeepSeek reviews by the same reviewer path and passed with no blocking findings. Non-blocking extension and directory guard findings were addressed before closeout; the broader non-Workbench dynamic guard remains outside this risk scope.
